title: Duskdreamer
description: A modpack for strange creatures to do strange stuff in.
body:
Duskdreamer is a simple modpack built around the Origins mod, with a focus on chill and cozy gameplay for multiplayer or survival.

The _Origins_ mod allowas players to select unique backgrounds that grant interesting powers...and sometimes a drawback or two.

The world comes alive with biome mods such as _Geophilic_, which gives the vanilla biomes a fresh new feeling, and _Nature's Spirit_, which adds a bunch of entirely new biomes and blocks to explore and build with. Additionally, the End receives a complete overhaul with the _Better End_ mod.

There are also many mods that lend well to th emultiplayer experience, such as _Customizable Player Models, Simple Voice Chat, and Xaero's World map and minimap._

There's also backports for some of the 1.21 features, such as a speculative copper golem mod, happy ghasts, copper and tuff blocks, and the pale garden.

Upgrade your builds with the _Handcrafted_ mod, _Hearth & Home_, _Fairylights_, and more.
